name: Noteted
description: A note taking app made with customtkinter. This project has been dropped due to having issues with the customtkinter library.

name: Creativity Archived
description: A place to share games, software, and many other creative content that you desire.

name: VLC.UTILS
description: Share your current playing in VLC to LastFM to scrobble, and show off to your friends using Discord RPC.

name: Send Your Files
description: A way to share your files to different providers.

name: WhatsAnApp
description: An alternative to the official WhatsApp desktop client with custom features. Supported for cross platform. Currently under heavy break.

name: HostRN
description: A simple and fast way to host your services without docker.

name: Pyder
description: Like Tauri and Wails, but for Python developers.

name: LitV
description: A `uv` inspired tool made with Rust. A python helper if you will.

name: GitUI
description: A minimal alternative to GitHub Desktop. Not a full on replacement. Maybe later...

name: Protux
description: A terminal inspired by `cmux` but for cross-desktop.

name: ThisCordRPC
description: A simple Discord RPC client with presets, and many others to come.

name: EWgent
description: A tool to write a prompt before you send it to your preferred LLM.

name: Guh
description: Too cool to use GitHub Desktop but stupid to not know how to use Git CLI? This is for you.
